intended_use: Ligence Heart is a fully automated software platform that processes, analyses and makes measurements on acquired transthoracic cardiac ultrasound images, automatically producing a full report with mea
intended_use_full: Ligence Heart is a fully automated software platform that processes, analyses and makes measurements on acquired transthoracic cardiac ultrasound images, automatically producing a full report with measurements of several key cardiac structural and functional parameters. The data produced by this software is intended to be used to support qualified cardiologists or sonographers for clinical decision making. Ligence Heart is indicated for use in adult patients.
target_condition: Adult cardiac dysfunction requiring echocardiographic assessment; specifically excludes congenital heart disease, valve disease, pericardial disease, and intra-cardiac lesions
ground_truth: Three independent expert sonographers performing manual measurements
other_metrics: Individual Equivalence Coefficient (IEC) with 95% confidence interval upper limit < 0.25 for all four parameters (LVEF, LVEDV, LVESV, lateral e'); Intraclass Correlation Coefficients (ICC) ≥ 0.90 for all four parameters
